name: Employer-Provided Educational Assistance Exclusion

eligibility.description: Requires a separate written plan that does not discriminate in favor of highly compensated employees or owners (5% limit for owners).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers can provide up to $5,250 per year in tax-free educational assistance to employees for tuition, fees, books, and certain student loan repayments.
